_instructions: Coordinates are percentage offsets on the visual map (x: 0-100 left→right, y: 0-100 top→bottom). Adjust without touching React code.

pageHero.title: Sterile PFS supply trusted across 25+ countries.
pageHero.text: A dedicated international section for distributors, hospital networks, and pharma partners to review market focus, product categories, and begin a country-specific export discussion.

section.title: International enquiries organised around markets, products, and documentation.
section.text: A focused export view for distributors and institutional buyers to review active markets, product categories, and start a country-specific discussion with Memphis.
